_description: This file documents how to configure the <envoy-chatbot> Web Component. It is a reference document, not a runtime config file.

htmlEmbed._comment: Minimal embed — paste this into any HTML page after loading the widget bundle

data-bot-id.description: The product/tenant ID. The widget fetches branding for this ID from GET /api/v1/products/:botId on startup. Must match a product_id in your backend.

data-api-base.description: The base URL of your host server (Express or FastAPI). All widget API calls are sent to this origin. Omit this attribute to use the same origin as the page.

javascriptAPI._comment: Public methods available on the <envoy-chatbot> element after it is mounted

open().description: Opens the chat window. Does nothing if already open.

close().description: Closes the chat window. Does nothing if already closed.

sendMessage(text).description: Programmatically sends a message as the user. Useful for pre-filling a support topic.

parameters.text: string — The message text to send.

sendMessage(text).example: widget.sendMessage('I need help with my order.');

resetConversation().description: Clears all messages and resets the conversation to the welcome state. Also clears localStorage history if conversationHistory feature flag is enabled.

destroy().description: Cleans up all event listeners and removes the element from the DOM. Use this when unmounting the widget from a single-page application.

customEvents._comment: Events fired by the widget. Listen with addEventListener on the element or any ancestor.

envoy-chat-opened.description: Fired when the chat window opens.

envoy-chat-closed.description: Fired when the chat window closes.

envoy-message-sent.description: Fired when the user sends a message.

detail.text: string — The message the user sent.

envoy-message-received.description: Fired when the bot finishes responding (after streaming completes).

detail.text: string — The full bot response text.

bundleOptions._comment: How the widget bundle is built and distributed
bundleOptions.selfRegisteringNote: The bundle automatically calls customElements.define('envoy-chatbot', EnvoyChatbot) when loaded. No additional registration code is needed.
